Whether you’re stocking up on post-workout essentials or everyday grab-and-go snacks, now’s a great time to save.

We have seen the variant of this power bank without the Type-C cable go for less in the past, but this is the best price we’ve seen on this more convenient model. Head below for more details.

items.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans

Lamicall 3-pack Heavy-Duty Extension Cord Storage Straps

Buy for $5 (Reg. $12)

Apply NLONU973 during checkout.

What we love

There are loads of more delicate straps and organization solutions for all of your indoor charging cables and EDC needs, but sometimes you need something more robust for extension cables and outdoor power cables, and even hoses. And if you do, I really like the 55-pound capacity, nylon build, and rustproof metal grommets here – especially at $5 for three different sizes.
